description: Internal record identifier for each observation.
Age of the customer when the outreach event occurred.
Work category associated with the customer.
Current household or partnership status.
Reported educational attainment category.
Indicator of prior credit repayment problems or default history.
Indicator showing whether the customer has a home loan.
Indicator showing whether the customer has a personal borrowing product.
Calendar month of the most recent outreach attempt.
Weekday on which the most recent contact took place.
Length of the latest contact interaction, measured in minutes.
Number of outreach attempts made during the current campaign cycle.
Elapsed days since the customer was last contacted; special negative value indicates no earlier contact.
Count of customer contacts that occurred before the current campaign cycle.
Recorded result of the most recent earlier outreach event.
Recent movement in a broader business or market activity indicator at the time of contact.
Price-level indicator associated with the period in which the contact occurred.
Confidence-style economic sentiment measure linked to the contact period.
Reference rate associated with the time period of the outreach.
Aggregate employment-related index associated with the contact period.
Outcome variable indicating whether the customer accepted the offered product.
Indicator showing whether this customer had been contacted previously.
Indicator showing whether a prior contact happened recently enough to meet the assigned recency rule.
